news.t: Manulife John Hancock Investments Launches New Active ETF Targeting Select Value Opportunities

holdings.infoBox: JDVL is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 5.23%, Amazon.com at 4.35%, NXP Semiconductors at 4.20%, Applied Materials at 4.00%, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 3.88%.

overview.description: The John Hancock Disciplined Value Select ETF (JDVL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, concentrated portfolio of undervalued US large cap equities. The fund seeks long-term capital growth. JDVL was launched on Aug 6, 2025 and is issued by John Hancock.

data.title: Manulife John Hancock Investments Launches New Active ETF Targeting Select Value Opportunities
data.text: BOSTON , Aug. 6, 2025 /PRNewswire/ - Manulife John Hancock Investments today will launch John Hancock Disciplined Value Select ETF (NYSE Arca: JDVL), a concentrated U.S. value portfolio and the second...
